title: 1800亿，「90后首富」被判了25年 | 原文
content: Former cryptocurrency magnate Sam Bankman‑Fried, once valued at 180 billion USD and dubbed the next Buffett, was sentenced to 25 years in a U.S. federal prison after his retrial request was denied. He will not be released until 2044. Bankman‑Fried’s decline from a celebrated figure to a convicted felon illustrates a drastic fall from grace within the crypto industry.

title: 新兴市场（EM）的多元化趋势正在消退
content: Emerging markets are increasingly showing reduced diversification, indicating that their markets are becoming more correlated. This trend means that returns on one emerging market are becoming more closely tied to those in others, diminishing the benefits of spreading investment across multiple emerging economies. As a result, portfolio managers may face greater risk of simultaneous losses when relying on diversification within this region.

normalizedTitle: 新兴市场 em 的多元化趋势正在消退

title: 茶颜悦色 , 装不下去了
content: Tea Yan Yeshui, a popular Hunan‑based milk tea brand known for slow service, opened two Shenzhen stores on the 1st of May. Opening day attracted large crowds and resale prices surged, but queues dropped to about an hour the next day. With most of its 734 stores still in Hunan, the move marks its first expansion into Southern China and a push into tier‑one cities. However, competition is fierce: Shenzhen hosts over 12,000 beverage shops, and major rivals already have 160‑plus outlets. Tea Yan Yeshui’s exclusive, non‑delivery model, its higher rent and labor costs, and limited supply‑chain infrastructure in the region present significant challenges as it aims for profitability and wider brand reach.
eventKey: 茶颜悦色-装不下去了
normalizedTitle: 茶颜悦色 装不下去了

content: The Mediterranean’s traditional summer super‑yacht season has shifted east‑to‑west, with high‑end vessels now transiting more frequently from the eastern Mediterranean to the western regions. title: 日本高市在演讲中阐述了修订后的印太愿景
content: Japan’s top environment minister, Masashi Takaichi, announced plans to reshape Japan’s Indo‑Pacific strategy. He said the country will refine its Indo‑Pacific vision, emphasizing economic integration, regional cooperation, and security cooperation. Takaichi also highlighted a new direction that moves beyond a one‑size‑fits‑all approach and reflects the rise of emerging economies in the region. The speech signals Japan’s intention to adjust its policy framework to better suit current regional dynamics.

title: 瑞士限制人口增长的计划在公投前获得支持
content: Swiss officials have secured backing for a proposal to limit population growth before an upcoming referendum. The plan aims to cap net gains in the Swiss population, a move said to address concerns over resource use, housing, and infrastructure pressures. The decision reflects growing debate over demographic policy in Switzerland, with stakeholders weighing the benefits of population control against potential economic and social impacts.

title: 尽管战火纷飞，为何股市却一路飙升
content: Despite ongoing conflicts, stock markets continue to rise because investors view equities as a hedge against uncertainty, and growth prospects in key sectors remain strong. Policymakers’ monetary easing and aggressive fiscal stimulus further support market optimism. Thus, geopolitical tensions have not deterred investment sentiment, leading to sustained bullish trends in global markets.

title: 2026 05 02 HackerNews
content: The HackerNews discussion covers a range of tech issues: Rivian owners can disable vehicle data transmission at the cost of navigation and OTA updates; LinkedIn scans browser extensions to build detailed user profiles; a macOS tool, WhatCable, reads USB‑C cable specs; X.ai’s grok‑4.3 offers large context and low cost; Apple’s accidental reveal of Claude.md suggests internal use of Anthropic models; Uber spent its 2026 AI budget on Claude Code in four months; a Game Boy emulator showcases F#’s type safety; “gay jailbreak” exploits LLM role‑playing to bypass filters; U.S. senators ban prediction‑market trading; police misuse license‑plate readers to stalk partners; and other HackerNews posts discuss kernel vulnerability disclosure, AI cost concerns, and network hardware.

title: 今起施行，杭州为具身智能机器人立法
content: In 2024, Hangzhou enacted the city’s first local regulation for embodied intelligent robotics. The ordinance, titled “Regulations on Promoting the Development of the Embodied Intelligent Robot Industry”, aims to safeguard technological innovation and support high‑quality growth. Hangzhou already hosts over 700 robotics firms, and by 2025 its embodied‑robotics cluster is expected to generate 106.8 billion yuan in output value.

title: 摩尔线程完成 DeepSeek-V4 全链路工程化适配
content: MooreThread has validated the full operation of DeepSeek‑V4 using its flagship AI training and inference card, the MTT S5000, and its custom MUSA software stack. Leveraging the open‑source SGLang inference framework, the team completed complete end‑to‑end testing of the model. This demonstrates the compatibility and performance of DeepSeek‑V4 within MooreThread’s hardware and software ecosystem.

title: DeepSeek 公布多模态模型技术报告后又删除
content: DeepSeek released a multimodal large model and a technical report that introduced a novel “visual primitive” reasoning framework to overcome spatial reference limitations in current multimodal language models. The report criticized existing chain‑of‑thought approaches for failing to address referential gaps, proposing that spatial tokens become the core reasoning unit to enable accurate spatial inference. Although the framework claimed comparable performance to leading models, the paper was later removed from public access.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 快科技
